message:
feat(mux): extract delta text from bonus lines and propagate through streaming bridge

Improve the pane output capture pipeline to carry actual terminal text
instead of metadata-only placeholders:

- PaneDelta::Output: add delta_text field containing best-effort UTF-8
  text extracted from render-change bonus lines via the mux protocol

- bonus_lines_to_text(): new helper in mux_client that joins bonus
  line content from GetPaneRenderChanges into a newline-delimited
  string, providing the closest available approximation to output
  deltas when polling render changes

- StreamingBridge: prefer delta_text when non-empty, falling back to
  the previous metadata string (dirty range/row counts + title) when
  no bonus lines are present. This makes downstream capture segments
  contain real terminal output rather than synthetic summaries

- Update all PaneDelta::Output construction sites in tests to include
  the new delta_text field

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
